view.title: Validate persona scenario #2

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior, but the evidence provided does not include specific results or outcomes from the simulation of the persona scenario. While the expected result mentions a confirmation of scenario behavior or a clear failure report, there are no traces or snapshots captured to support this validation. Therefore, the assessment is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence to support the requirement.
